title: deyeuxia formosana
intro: Deyeuxia formosana, also known as Formosa Deyeuxia or Taiwan Deyeuxia, is a type of grass native to Taiwan and is used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Deyeuxia formosana include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Deyeuxia formosana can be prepared as an herbal tea or decoction by infusing its dried leaves and stems in hot water, allowing it to be used in traditional Chinese medicine.
